---
title: "4) R Basics 3 - EDA and ggplot2"
---

## This Week: 

In this week, we'll continue talking about coding in R, using the grammar of graphics framework and `ggplot2` to create high quality graphics.


<br>


### 🎯 Objectives

At the end of this unit you will be able to:

- Explain how `ggplot2` relates to the `tidyverse`

- Explain how `ggplot2` utilizes the grammar of graphics to create visuals

- Create a basic data graphic 

- Access and use datasets from `baseR` 


<br>


### 🌠 Slides

Find today's slides [here.](slides.html)


### 💻 Code

Find today's activity [here.](week4-activity.qmd) Please download the `week4-activity.qmd` file from BCourses and open in it your IDE of choice (Positron or RStudio). Once finished, please upload your completed .qmd and .html files to BCourses.


<br>


### 📖 Assignment

__Reading__: No reading this week!

__Homework__: No HW this week! Study for Quiz 1.
